case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. MARIA CANDELARIA GUERRERO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2017 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,820.05 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRERO, MARIA CANDELARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 SERVED JUN-27-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRERO, MARIA CANDELARIA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUERRERO, MARIA CANDELARIA $1,820.05 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,935.05 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-23-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-23-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT MARIA CANDELARIA GUERRERO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
